title: Decryption failure during import
symptom: An error occurs stating 'wrong final block length' when trying to import data using the import:entities command, indicating a decryption failure.
root_cause: The decryption failure is a side effect of incompatible entity structures due to the migration from one major version to another and the change in database types. The encryption key may be the same, but the underlying data structure has changed.
fix_steps: Ensure you are following the correct migration path by upgrading to the latest 1.x version.
Export workflows and credentials instead of using import:entities.
Set up the new instance and import the exported data using the appropriate commands.
agent_instruction: Use the export and import commands for workflows and credentials instead of import:entities.
